prep.summary: You must align with Zahid on the P&C process health strategy—specifically resolving the tool overlap and high costs associated with ServiceNow and Celonis. Your recent reviews with Suresh and Ray highlight a critical need to establish architectural guardrails—preventing unsustainable consumption-based ServiceNow licensing—while managing stalled CMT and NART pilots. You need to pitch a unified P&C process scorecard that monitors manual blind spots without relying on an expensive—and redundant—one-size-fits-all framework.
tasks: Coordinate with Zahid to define operational guardrails—specifically managing where ServiceNow, Celonis, and SCAN overlap.
Finalize the architectural framework for the P&C process health scorecard to eliminate highly manual operational blind spots.
Establish a consistent business engagement process—using formal minutes—to hold partners accountable for process requirements.
Schedule an alignment meeting with Deepak to resolve the stalled Resiliency and NART pilots.
prep.title: Sync with Zahid on ServiceNow

focus_html:
Focus · Next up
6:30 PM — 7:30 PM

Sync with Zahid on ServiceNow

Prep

You must align with Zahid on the P&C process health strategy—specifically resolving the tool overlap and high costs associated with ServiceNow and Celonis. Your recent reviews with Suresh and Ray highlight a critical need to establish architectural guardrails—preventing unsustainable consumption-based ServiceNow licensing—while managing stalled CMT and NART pilots. You need to pitch a unified P&C process scorecard that monitors manual blind spots without relying on an expensive—and redundant—one-size-fits-all framework.

  • Coordinate with Zahid to define operational guardrails—specifically managing where ServiceNow, Celonis, and SCAN overlap.
  • Finalize the architectural framework for the P&C process health scorecard to eliminate highly manual operational blind spots.
  • Establish a consistent business engagement process—using formal minutes—to hold partners accountable for process requirements.
  • Schedule an alignment meeting with Deepak to resolve the stalled Resiliency and NART pilots.
